jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Biocon
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? Biocon in Kanpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Biocon:
Biocon is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Biocon!
